goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the east. The restaurant should serve portuguese food. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves indian food. Make sure you get address. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum and should be in the same area as the restaurant. Make sure you get phone number, postcode, and entrance fee

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm looking for an expensive restaurant.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Okay and what type of food would you like to eat?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I want Portuguese food.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I can look that up for you. What area should the restaurant be in?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: In the East please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I don't see any restaurants matching that criteria. Do you have another preference?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: How about Indian food?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I would suggest sitar tandoori.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Great! Can I get their address please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It is at 3 High Street Cherry Hinton Cherry Hinton

non-categorical.value: 3 High Street Cherry Hinton Cherry Hinton

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you. I am also looking for a museum to visit near the restaurant.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The Cambridge Artworks meets your criteria and has a free entrance fee.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Great, would you happen to know there address along with postcode? Do you have there phone number as well?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Cambridge Artworks is  located at 5 greens road, postcode cb13ef, phone number 01223902168

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you, that will be all for me today! Bye!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Bye.  Have a great day!

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range and should be in the north. The restaurant should serve lebanese food. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 17:15 on thursday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the restaurant. Make sure you get entrance fee and attraction type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you help me find a restaurant in the north that is cheap?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure! Would you like Indian or Italian food?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like Lebanese food.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I don't have any that match. Do you have any other prefences?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: How about italian food then?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure. Da Vinci Pizzeria is a cheap Italian restaurant in the area. The address is 20 Milton Road Chesterton CB41JY and the phone number is 01223351707.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Would you mind making a reservation for Thursday at 17:15 please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Okay! For how many people?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: The reservation will be for 5 people

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Your reservation for da vinci pizzeria on this thursday at 17:15 for a party of 5 was successful. Your Reference number is : UG63SDOH.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am also looking for places to go in town in the same area as the restaurant.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have four attractions and they include boat park and 2 swimming-pool. Which one will you prefer?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Whatever you recommend is fine. I'll need the entrance fee and attraction type.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Is there a certain type of attraction that you prefer?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, please give me the entrance fee for the boat park.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm sorry, but the entrance fee for the boat park is unknown. Would you like the phone number?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: no thanks, that will be all.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Thanks for using our service today!

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college and should be in the centre. Make sure you get phone number and postcode. You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range and should be in the same area as the attraction. The restaurant should serve afghan food. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves mediterranean food. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 12:00 on thursday. If the booking fails how about 11:00. Make sure you get the reference number

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am looking for college attractions in the centre.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: We have 13 colleges in the centre, and most have free entry, such as Christ's College.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Great, can you give me the phone number and postcode of Christ's college?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Of course, the phone number is 01223334900, and the post code is cb23bu.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Also want to find someplace to eat.  Want to be in the cheap price range and in the same area of town.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: How About Chinese?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I was thinking more on the lines of afghan food.  Do you have any listings for that?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I am afraid I don't. Would you like to try a different area or cuisine?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Could you check fr mediterranean please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The Gardenia is a Mediterranean restaurant in the centre of town, would you like to make a reservation?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I will need it for three, at noon, on Thursday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I am sorry, but the Gardenia does not have any openings for noon on Thursday for 3 people. Would you like for me check a different time for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: How about at 11:00?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Booking was successful. The table will be reserved for 15 minutes. Reference number is : RBZGP3RX. Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, thank you, that should be all.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: you are welcome to use our services anytime.

goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of nightclub and should be in the centre. Make sure you get postcode. You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve north indian food and should be in the same area as the attraction. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food. Make sure you get postcode

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like to go to a nightclub in the centre.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You have five options for nightclubs in the center. Soul Tree Nightclub has the lowest entry fee, at 4 pounds.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What is the postcode for Soul Tree Nightclub?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The post code is cb23qf. Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes.  Are there any North Indian restaurants close to the nightclub?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: What's your price range?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like something cheap.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are no North Indian restaurants but there are some Indian restaurants in the centre of town. Would you like information about one of those?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Actually, can you check for a Chinese restaurant in the north then?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm sorry I may have misunderstood. Were you looking for cheap Indian food on the north side of town?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I was, but since there's no cheap Indian food in the north I want to see if there's any cheap Chinese in the north.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There's no cheap Chinese food in the north. Would you like me try something else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: are there any chinese restaurants that are cheap in the north?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Unfortunately, there are none. Could you like to try an alternative type of food?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, i didn't have any other choices.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: perhaps we try a different location?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Do you have any cheap chinese restaurants in the centre?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes, we have 3. I recommend Golden House.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Great, can I just get the postcode?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes, the postcode is cb21eg. Can i assist you further, today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, that's all I need today. Thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You're welcome. Enjoy your trip! Goodbye

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called rice house. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 14:30 on tuesday. If the booking fails how about 13:30. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum. Make sure you get phone number

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like to find a restaurant called Rice House. Do you know where it is?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes! The Rice House is located at 88 Mill Road, City Centre.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Could you please book me a table for 3 people at 14:30 on Tuesday?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Certainly! You're all set. Your reference number is K7KOY3A5 and they'll hold your table for 15 minutes. Can I help you with anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you, yes I'm also looking for a museum in town. Can you recommend one?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure, I would recommend Cambridge Contemporary Art Museum located in the Centre. Would you like a reservation?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I just want the phone number actually

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Okay, you can call them at 01223324222

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thanks, that was the last thing I needed from you! Have a good day!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Alright, you have a wonderful time then, bye!
